locations.name: 雨林
locations.summary: 雨林是雨量甚多的生物區系。雨林依位置的不同分热带雨林和溫帶雨林。雨林大多数靠近赤道，在赤道经过的非洲、亚洲和南美洲都有大片的雨林。湿润的气候保证了树和植物的快速生产。同时，树和植物也为雨林中的成千上万种生物提供了食物和庇护所。雨林曾經覆蓋…

relations.subject: Red-fronted parrotlet
relations.evidence: In the dry season it inhabits very wet and cool evergreen montane forest at elevations up to ; in the wet season it moves to lower elevation rainforest

relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Red-fronted parrotlet
relations.evidence: "Habitat loss is however low within the range, particularly in the highlands, and the species is not facing substantial threats." "Uncommon to rare, although probably much overlooked and tolerant of a degree of habitat disturbance; apparently not traded."
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
